BROKENTALES.Content.hunter-equipment.a.b: a beautiful fan to hide my face, dresses for every occasion
a butterfly-shaped hair clip (reminder of Akihiro)
BROKENTALES.Content.hunter-equipment.a.c: a cape and a top hat
A circus stick with three extendable segments
a cross engraved with the Keys of Saint Peter (universal symbol of power)
BROKENTALES.Content.hunter-equipment.a.d: A doll and a little wooden soldier — the only items I had with me when I was found. A worn-out gray travel dress stained with blood. A sharp butcher’s knife. A hair ribbon, gift from a Hunter of the Order. A cookbook filled with recipes for cakes and sweets
BROKENTALES.Content.hunter-equipment.a.f: a few doses of deadly Aqua Tofana
BROKENTALES.Content.hunter-equipment.a.g: a golden diadem so tight on my forehead that it cannot be removed
BROKENTALES.Content.hunter-equipment.a.h: a heart-shaped locket hanging from a gold chain with the names of my lost loves engraved within
BROKENTALES.Content.hunter-equipment.a.k: a key that opens one of many secret refuges
BROKENTALES.Content.hunter-equipment.a.l: a large amount of coins and precious trinkets
a large bag full of treasures
a little toy given by someone helped with the first good deed
a long burgundy cape, gold and jewels gifted by countless suitors
A long leather whip with metal studs and spikes
BROKENTALES.Content.hunter-equipment.a.n: a necklace of stones and wood that I carry in a paw—token of the only human I do not consider food
BROKENTALES.Content.hunter-equipment.a.p: a papal ring as a symbol of indenture to the Church
A precious pipe of the finest workmanship
BROKENTALES.Content.hunter-equipment.a.s: a sharp stiletto I wear as a hairpin
a sheet with the drawing of a Chinese landscape — gift from a child who once watched one of my shows
a shepherd’s curved staff of wood and iron to beat the devil with
a small bag with precious items collected during adventures
a small ice sphere that never melts
a stage kimono and theatrical effects
a sturdy cane with a hidden blade
a sword and a spear blessed by the Pope himself
BROKENTALES.Content.hunter-equipment.a.v: a volume of the Biblioteca Universale Sacro-Profana Encyclopedia. Day (Sly): Worn-out clothes, sharp long knife
BROKENTALES.Content.hunter-equipment.a.w: a worn out sickle (reminder of times past)
an exquisitely crafted Larva (typical mask of the Venice Carnival)
An old and worn-out black cloak
An old cassock worn from many travels
an old ocarina (the first instrument I ever played), and Hamelin
an old pouch containing mysterious items taken while the demon is in control

BROKENTALES.ScenarioGifts.VoiceOfSpirits: You have come into contact with the Gift Spirit.

By calming your mind and concentrating, you can open your mind to the spiritual world and communicate with restless souls. Spend 1 Soma to contact a creature with the Spirit Gift you've previously encountered. You do not suffer the Wound caused by the stress of spiritual connection.
BROKENTALES.ScenarioGifts.WolfKiller.req: Having faced the wolves in a fight at least once.
BROKENTALES.ScenarioGifts.WolfKiller.eff: You know how to deal with the fiercest of wolves and are careful not to be surrounded. When you obtain at least a Standard Outcome on a Position or Defense Check against a pack of beasts, you can immediately eliminate 1 Minor animal NPC with 1 Wound.
BROKENTALES.ScenarioGifts.Sweetie.name: Where are you going all alone, sweetie?
BROKENTALES.ScenarioGifts.Sweetie.requir: To meet Iskra alone in the forest.
BROKENTALES.ScenarioGifts.Sweetie.effect: You are attracted to the little girl who pretends to be a wolf and you dream of devouring her. Once per Scene, you can spend 1 Soma to know exactly where she is. If you anticipate her and arrive somewhere before her, you get 1 Additional Success on every Check you make to hurt or devour that little morsel. As long as she is present in the Scene, you receive 1 Penalty in all Defense Checks.
BROKENTALES.ScenarioGifts.Sweetie.specia: Special Gift for Garou the Old Wolf
